scripts.build: bun run --cwd apps/cli build && bun run --cwd packages/openapi build && bun run --cwd packages/ops build && bun run --cwd packages/abtest build && bun run --cwd packages/mcp build
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/openapi test && bun run --cwd packages/abtest test
scripts.test:all: bun run test && bun run test:e2e
